message:
test(proptest): add 13 property tests for tx_execution engine types (ft-1i2ge.8)

Serde roundtrip tests for TxExecutionConfig and TxExecutionResult, plus
execution determinism, commit count invariants, failure injection coverage,
state machine terminal state checks, kill-switch/pause verification, and
monotonic event sequence properties.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
